test_cases.name: health_check_returns_200
test_cases.description: Verifies that the health check endpoint returns 200 OK.

test_cases.name: create_author_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that a new author can be created with valid data.

test_cases.name: create_author_missing_required_field
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating an author without a required field (name) returns 422.

test_cases.name: create_author_with_invalid_born_year
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating an author with born_year outside the valid range returns 422.

test_cases.name: list_authors_with_default_pagination
test_cases.description: Verifies that the list authors endpoint returns paginated results with default values.

test_cases.name: list_authors_with_custom_pagination
test_cases.description: Verifies that the list authors endpoint respects custom skip and limit parameters.

test_cases.name: get_existing_author_by_id
test_cases.description: Verifies that an existing author can be retrieved by ID.

test_cases.name: get_nonexistent_author_by_id
test_cases.description: Verifies that requesting a non-existent author returns 404.

test_cases.name: get_author_with_if_none_match_returns_304
test_cases.description: Verifies that a conditional GET with If-None-Match returns 304 if the author hasn't changed.

test_cases.name: update_author_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that an author can be updated with valid data.

test_cases.name: update_author_with_if_match_etag_mismatch
test_cases.description: Verifies that updating an author with an outdated ETag returns 412.

test_cases.name: delete_author_without_books
test_cases.description: Verifies that an author without books can be deleted.

test_cases.name: delete_author_with_books_returns_409
test_cases.description: Verifies that deleting an author with associated books returns 409.

test_cases.name: create_category_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that a new category can be created with valid data.

test_cases.name: create_category_with_duplicate_name
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating a category with a duplicate name returns 409.

test_cases.name: create_book_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that a new book can be created with valid data.

test_cases.name: create_book_with_duplicate_isbn
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating a book with a duplicate ISBN returns 409.

test_cases.name: create_book_with_invalid_published_year
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating a book with published_year outside the valid range returns 422.

test_cases.name: list_books_with_default_pagination
test_cases.description: Verifies that the list books endpoint returns paginated results with default values.

test_cases.name: list_books_with_filters
test_cases.description: Verifies that the list books endpoint respects filters like author_id and category_id.

test_cases.name: get_existing_book_by_id
test_cases.description: Verifies that an existing book can be retrieved by ID.

test_cases.name: get_soft_deleted_book_returns_410
test_cases.description: Verifies that requesting a soft-deleted book returns 410.

test_cases.name: update_book_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that a book can be updated with valid data.

test_cases.name: update_soft_deleted_book_returns_410
test_cases.description: Verifies that updating a soft-deleted book returns 410.

test_cases.name: soft_delete_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that a book can be soft-deleted.

test_cases.name: delete_already_soft_deleted_book_returns_410
test_cases.description: Verifies that deleting an already soft-deleted book returns 410.

test_cases.name: restore_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that a soft-deleted book can be restored.

test_cases.name: restore_non_deleted_book_returns_400
test_cases.description: Verifies that restoring a non-deleted book returns 400.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_eligible_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that a discount can be applied to a book older than 1 year.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_new_book_returns_400
test_cases.description: Verifies that applying a discount to a new book returns 400.
